---
title: "Research"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
css: styles/cv.css
updated: "July 22, 2026"
header-includes:
  - |
    <style>
      :root { --updated-text: "Updated: {{< meta updated >}}"; }
    </style>
---

::: {.no-print .contact-block}
*Updated: {{< meta updated >}}*
:::

### Science Projects
- **PBHs and Dark Matter:** The Link Between the Early Universe and Modern Cosmology [2025]{.cvdate}
  - State Science Fair Finalist

![](assets/images/science%20posters/PBH_darkmatter.jpeg)

- **Disentangling the Cosmic Web:** The Relationship Between Walls and Other Cosmic Structures [2026]{.cvdate}
  - Link: https://efuleky27.github.io/disperse/
  - International Science and Engineering Fair Finalist

![](assets/images/science%20posters/Cosmic_web.jpg)
